    The Ivory Club
    Patient Portal

    ​Cosmetic Treatments

    At Olive + Ivory Dental Studio, we proudly offer a diverse range of cosmetic treatments designed to enhance your appearance. From professional teeth whitening and custom veneers to neuromodulators and non-invasive facial rejuvenation options, our team is dedicated to helping you look and feel your best.

    Book Now

    Teeth whitening is one of the most popular cosmetic treatments available, and for good reason. Over time, our teeth can become discoloured due to various factors such as aging, dietary choices, and lifestyle habits like smoking. At Olive + Ivory Dental Studio, we offer professional teeth whitening options that effectively brighten your smile.


    Want to learn more about our teeth whitening treatments and how they can enhance your smile? Schedule a consultation with us today!

    At Olive + Ivory Dental Studio, we’re committed to offering treatments that enhance your smile with precision and care. Composite bonding is a popular, minimally invasive cosmetic procedure that addresses small imperfections such as chips, cracks, gaps, or discolouration. Using a composite resin material custom-matched to your tooth colour, Dr. Jehan has obtained training to expertly shape and bond the resin to the tooth’s surface, creating a seamless, natural-looking finish. Composite Veneers can be a less expensive option vs. porcelain veneers and usually require regular maintenance and polishing to keep them looking bright and shiny.


    Why Choose Composite Bonding? Composite bonding is an ideal choice for those looking for a cost-effective, gentle solution to enhance cosmetic concerns. In most cases it requires no enamel removal, offering a quick and comfortable treatment with no downtime. For those seeking a stronger, more permanent smile makeover, we also offer porcelain veneers, providing long-lasting, custom coverage for multiple teeth.


    Explore composite bonding at Olive + Ivory Dental Studio and discover how this effective, minimally invasive procedure can elevate your smile. Schedule a consultation today to learn more about our cosmetic options, including veneers and other treatments tailored to suit your needs.


    Our custom-made porcelain veneers are expertly designed to transform your smile by effectively covering imperfections such as chips, gaps, and discolouration. These thin shells are meticulously bonded to the front surface of your teeth, resulting in a natural-looking and radiant smile that can last for many years.


    Porcelain veneers are an excellent choice for those seeking a quick and impactful transformation. They offer a dramatic enhancement in appearance, significantly boosting self-esteem with minimal discomfort. The process typically begins with a consultation, where your dental professional assesses your needs and discusses your desired outcomes.


    In addition to enhancing the aesthetics of your smile, veneers contribute to overall facial harmony, as a well-aligned and luminous smile positively influences facial proportions. Furthermore, porcelain is stain-resistant and durable, ensuring that your veneers maintain their beauty over time with proper care.


    Investing in porcelain veneers isn't just about improving your appearance; it's about embracing the confidence that comes from having a smile you can be proud of. If you're seeking a long-lasting solution to enhance your smile and overall facial aesthetics, porcelain veneers may be the perfect choice for you.


    At Olive + Ivory Dental Studio, we offer neuromodulator treatments, including Botox, to help you achieve a more youthful and refreshed appearance. This non-surgical option is designed to minimize the visibility of fine lines and wrinkles, enhancing your facial features without invasive procedures. Neuromodulators work by temporarily relaxing the muscles responsible for expression lines, resulting in a smoother and rejuvenated complexion. We focus on providing natural-looking results that enhance your beauty while meeting your specific needs.


    In addition to their aesthetic benefits, neuromodulators can also have therapeutic applications, such as alleviating symptoms of bruxism (teeth grinding) and reducing headaches.


    If you’re ready to explore how neuromodulator treatments can complement your smile and boost your confidence, schedule a consultation at Olive + Ivory Dental Studio today!


    Emface is our next step in total facial aesthetics - because the face that frames your smile deserves just as much care. This needle-free, no-downtime treatment uses synchronized radiofrequency and HIFES™ technology to lift, firm, and tone the deeper structures of the face while smoothing the skin above. By strengthening key facial muscles and enhancing collagen and elastin, Emface helps reduce fine lines, improve contour, and restore youthful support. It’s ideal for individuals seeking a subtle, natural-looking lift. The result is a refreshed, rebalanced appearance that elevates not only your facial harmony but the way your smile is seen and expressed.


    This technology can also offer therapeutic relief from TMD-related muscle tension. By gently retraining overactive facial muscles and reducing the strain placed on the jaw, Emface can help ease tightness, improve function, and support more comfortable movement. Many patients experience a noticeable softening of clenching habits and a reduction in the daily discomfort caused by TMJ stress.


    Exion Face is part of our evolution into total facial aesthetics - enhancing the skin that surrounds, supports, and showcases your smile. This advanced, needle-free treatment pairs monopolar radiofrequency with targeted AI-guided ultrasound to stimulate deep collagen, elastin, and hyaluronic acid production. By reaching layers traditional devices can’t, Exion Face improves firmness, refines texture, and restores natural volume from within. Most sessions take about 20–30 minutes, with patients describing the sensation as warmth with intermittent, gentle pulses. There is no downtime, making it easy to return to your day immediately. You’ll notice early improvements within a few weeks, with full results building over two to three months as your skin regenerates. These results can last a year or longer, offering a subtle, elegant rejuvenation that elevates both your facial harmony and the beauty of your smile.

    If you want to straighten your teeth without drawing attention, our clear aligner therapy is an excellent choice.

    These comfortable and removable aligners provide a flexible option compared to traditional braces, enabling you to achieve a stunning smile without the inconvenience of metal brackets and wires. Clear aligners are nearly invisible, making them a great fit for both adults and teens seeking a more discreet treatment. Additionally, since they can be removed, you can enjoy your favourite foods and maintain excellent oral hygiene during your treatment.


    Often times, clear aligner therapy is the first step in a smile transformation. By moving the teeth into the correct position, we can stabilize the bite and reduce the number of teeth and amount of tooth structure removed during a veneer procedure. Harmonizing the bite first also reduces interferences, and increases the longevity of veneers by reducing the risk of chips or breaks.


    Interested in learning more? Schedule a consultation at Olive + Ivory Dental Studio today!


    Our modern technology revolutionizes the dental experience by allowing us to create and place dental crowns or partial crowns in just a single visit. This innovative approach not only saves you valuable time but also guarantees a precise fit and aesthetic appeal tailored to your unique smile.


    With same-day crowns, you can conveniently avoid the hassle of multiple appointments and the inconvenience of temporary crowns. Instead, you will receive a strong, long-lasting and natural-looking restoration in just 2 hours, giving you the confidence and functionality you deserve. Experience the future of dentistry with our advanced techniques and enjoy the benefits of efficient, high-quality care that prioritizes your needs and comfort.


    If you’re missing one or more teeth, dental bridges can be an effective solution to restore your smile and improve your oral function. A dental bridge is a prosthetic device designed to fill the gap left by missing teeth, using adjacent teeth or dental implants as anchors for support.


    Bridges are not only essential for aesthetic reasons; they play a significant role in maintaining the alignment of your teeth and preserving your facial structure. When a tooth is lost, the surrounding teeth may shift into the empty space over time, leading to bite misalignment and further dental issues. A bridge helps prevent this shifting, ensuring your bite remains stable and functional.


    Benefits of Dental Bridges:

    • Restoration of Function: Missing teeth can hinder your ability to chew and speak properly. Dental bridges restore this function, allowing you to enjoy a varied diet without discomfort and speak clearly.

    • Improved Aesthetics: Bridges are custom-made to match the color, shape, and size of your natural teeth, providing a seamless look. This restoration can significantly enhance your smile, contributing to increased self-confidence and a more youthful appearance.

    • Support for Facial Structure: Missing teeth can lead to bone loss and changes in your facial structure. By filling in these gaps, dental bridges help maintain the natural shape of your face and prevent further bone deterioration.

    • Durability and Longevity: With proper care, dental bridges can last for many years, making them a cost-effective option for tooth restoration. Our team at Olive + Ivory Dental Studio uses high-quality materials to ensure your bridge is both strong and aesthetically pleasing.

    • Comfort: Designed to fit securely and comfortably, dental bridges minimize discomfort and allow you to eat, speak, and smile without worrying about your restoration.

    At Olive + Ivory Dental Studio, we prioritize personalized care, ensuring that each dental bridge is custom-crafted to meet your unique needs. Schedule an appointment today to learn more about how dental bridges can restore your smile.


    Your Full-Service Dental Experience

    At Olive + Ivory Dental Studio, our comprehensive services extend beyond cosmetic treatments. We prioritize your oral health by offering a full range of preventive and restorative solutions to ensure your smile remains healthy and beautiful.
